Today belongs to you

Happy Birthday, Priyanshi!

🌸

From the heart

Things I Want You to Know, Priyanshi

You are the most valuable and lovable person in my entire life —
and I mean that with every single beat of this heart.

I love the way you get angry on me.
I love the way you explain everything I mess up — every single time.

I love your everything.
Everything you do, in every way you do it.

I am the luckiest person in this world —
because in my highs and in my lows,
you always stood right beside me.

I don't have a particular reason for loving you.
I just do. Completely. Without condition.

I loveee youuuuhhhh sooooo muchhhh 🥺💖💞

🌻

About You

The Little Things That Make You, You

😤
Your Angry Face

When you get mad at me, it's somehow the most adorable and real thing in the world. I secretly love it every single time.

💬
How You Explain

You never give up on making me understand. You explain, re-explain, and stay patient — that's a kind of love most people never find.

🌟
Your Presence

In my highest highs and my lowest lows, you were always right there. That consistency is rarer than gold — and worth so much more.

💛
Your Everything

I don't love just one thing about you. I love every little thing you do, in every little way you do it. Every. Single. Thing.

Maharani Jii

Our Story

The Journey We've Shared

December 2024
✨ Where It All Began

The moment you came into my life — and from that very December, I made myself a promise. A promise that I will never leave your hand. Not in any situation. Not ever. And that promise still stands, today and always.

The Mistakes
🙏 I'm Sorry, From My Whole Heart

I know I've made mistakes — sometimes the same ones again and again — and I know they hurt you. I am truly, deeply sorry for every single one of them. You deserved better every time, and you still stayed. That is something I will never take for granted.

Every High & Low
🤝 You Never Left Me Either

You are so sweet, my girl — because even when I hurt you, even when I was wrong, you never left my side. In every situation, in every season of life, you were right there. That kind of loyalty is the rarest, most beautiful thing I've ever known.

Today & Forever
🌹 Be Happy. Be Mine.

Everything I need is you. Not just on your birthday — but every single day. Our story is still being written, and I want every chapter to have you in it. Be happy. Be mine. Always.

💛

Birthday Wishes

Everything I Wish for You, Priyanshi

  • Wish you a very Happy Birthday, my girl 🎂 — today is completely yours
  • May every single dream you've ever held close finally come true
  • May you achieve everything you've ever wanted — every single thing
  • May life be as sweet and giving to you as you are to everyone around you
  • May your heart always be full, your smile always be real
  • May you always know how deeply, completely, endlessly you are loved

From December 2024, I promised myself I'd never leave your hand — and that promise is still the truest thing I carry. I'm sorry for every time I hurt you. I'm grateful for every time you stayed.

Everything I need is you.
Not sometimes. Not on the good days. Always. 🌹🌻

Be happy. Be mine. 💖

I love you a lot, always 💞
🌹 🌻 🌷 🌸
